meaning: adj.每日的,每日发作的,平凡的,日常的n.日发虐
examples: I had hopes of escaping my quotidian world.
PEOPLE remember emotionally charged events more easily than they recall the quotidian.
Since then, other researchers have come up with other quotidian examples of event horizons.
The ritual aspects of makeup, smoke, and unusual typography help everyone leave the quotidian realm faster.
Most adventure races opt for more quotidian conveyance--foot, bicycle and inflatable kayak are standard.
